allow: Bash(node push_order.js --scenario "R2 · AU Post Standard Sydney · MIO · 5Mar · Before" --dry-run)

Bash(source /Users/khoinguyen/project/oms_tool/.env
curl -s \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" \\
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \\
  "https://api.github.com/repos/zalora/oms/pulls?state=closed&base=development-MY&per_page=10&sort=updated&direction=desc" \\
  | python3 -c "
import json,sys
from datetime import datetime, timezone
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if isinstance\(data, dict\) and 'message' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['message']\)
    sys.exit\(\)
for pr in data:
    if pr.get\('merged_at'\):
        merged = pr['merged_at']
        print\(f\\"PR #{pr['number']} | @{pr['user']['login']} | merged: {merged}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  Title: {pr['title']}\\"\)
        print\(f\\"  URL: {pr['html_url']}\\"\)
        print\(\)
")

Bash(source /Users/khoinguyen/project/oms_tool/.env
curl -s \\
  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" \\
  -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \\
  "https://api.github.com/repos/zalora/oms/commits?sha=development-MY&per_page=10" \\
  | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if isinstance\(data, dict\) and 'message' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['message']\); sys.exit\(\)
for c in data:
    sha = c['sha'][:7]
    msg = c['commit']['message'].split\('\\n'\)[0][:80]
    author = c['commit']['author']['name']
    date = c['commit']['author']['date']
    print\(f\\"{sha} | {date} | {author} | {msg}\\"\)
")

  -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" \\

  "https://api.github.com/repos/zalora/oms/commits?sha=development-MY&per_page=10" \\
  | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
if isinstance\(data, dict\) and 'message' in data:
    print\('ERROR:', data['message']\); sys.exit\(\)
for c in data:
    sha = c['sha'][:7]
    msg = c['commit']['message'].split\('\\n'\)[0][:80]
    author = c['commit']['author']['name']
    date = c['commit']['author']['date']
    print\(f'{sha}|{date}|{author}|{msg}'\)
")

Bash(source /Users/khoinguyen/project/oms_tool/.env
curl -s -H "Authorization: Bearer $GITHUB_TOKEN" -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \\
  "https://api.github.com/repos/zalora/oms/commits/7579926" \\
  | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('COMMIT:', d['sha'][:7], '|', d['commit']['message'].split\('\\n'\)[0]\)
print\('Author:', d['commit']['author']['name']\)
for f in d.get\('files',[]\):
    patch = f.get\('patch','\(no patch / binary\)'\)[:2000]
    print\(f\\"FILE: {f['filename']} +{f['additions']} -{f['deletions']}\\"\)
    print\(patch\)
    print\('---'\)
")
